hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.php ]] && docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q '^o3shop-app$'; then cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ./docker.sh cs-fixer 2>/dev/null || true; fi
